title: Epic 3: Strategy Management
description: Full strategy CRUD, start/stop/batch operations, strategy detail with trades and equity curve, strategy backtest.

title: Task 3.1: Strategy API + Store
description: src/api/strategy.ts + src/stores/strategies.ts: all 20+ strategy endpoints. CRUD, start/stop, batch.

title: Task 3.2: Strategy List Page
description: src/views/strategies/StrategyList.vue: table with status badges, batch actions, create button.

title: Task 3.3: Strategy Create/Edit Form
description: src/views/strategies/StrategyCreate.vue: exchange selector, symbol search, indicator config, triggers, risk controls.

title: Task 3.4: Strategy Detail Page
description: src/views/strategies/StrategyDetail.vue: config display, trades table, equity curve, notifications.

title: Task 3.5: Strategy Backtest Integration
description: Backtest form + history list + results display integrated into strategy detail.

title: Task 3.6: Commit Phase 3 PR
description: Branch feat/strategy-management. Open PR to main.

title: Epic 6: Admin + Settings + Billing + Community
description: Settings, exchange credentials, billing/plans, community marketplace, admin user management, Polymarket.

title: Task 6.1: Settings Page
description: src/api/settings.ts + src/views/settings/Settings.vue: schema display, values, save, OpenRouter balance, test connection.

title: Task 6.2: Exchange Credentials Page
description: src/views/settings/Credentials.vue: list/create/delete credentials, egress IP display.

title: Task 6.3: Billing Page
description: src/api/billing.ts + src/views/billing/Billing.vue: plans display, purchase flow, USDT payment.

title: Task 6.4: Community Page
description: src/api/community.ts + src/views/community/Community.vue: browse indicators, purchases, comments.

title: Task 6.5: User Management (Admin)
description: src/views/admin/UserManagement.vue: CRUD users, roles, credits, VIP. Uses user.ts API.

title: Task 6.6: Polymarket Page
description: src/views/polymarket/Polymarket.vue: analysis and history using polymarket.ts API.

title: Task 6.7: Commit Phase 6 PR
description: Branch feat/admin-settings-billing. Open PR to main.

title: Epic 1: Project Scaffold
description: Initialize Vue 3 + Vite + TypeScript project. Set up Axios, router, Pinia stores, layout components, i18n, theme system. Deliverable: working login page.

title: Task 1.1: Initialize Vite Vue 3 project
description: Run npm create vite@latest frontend_vue3 -- --template vue-ts. Install vue-router, pinia, ant-design-vue@4, vue-i18n, axios.

title: Task 1.10: Set up dark/light theme
description: Ant Design ConfigProvider with theme algorithm. Toggle in header. Persist in localStorage. No flash on load.

title: Task 1.11: Login page
description: src/views/auth/Login.vue: email+password form, authApi.login(), JWT storage, redirect after login.

title: Task 1.12: Register page
description: src/views/auth/Register.vue: registration form with authApi.register().

title: Task 1.13: Commit scaffold PR
description: Branch feat/frontend-scaffold. Verify npm run build passes. Open PR.

title: Task 1.2: Configure Vite
description: vite.config.ts: base=/, API proxy to localhost:5000, unplugin-vue-components, path aliases.

title: Task 1.3: Configure TypeScript
description: tsconfig.json: strict mode, @/ path alias. Verify: npx vue-tsc --noEmit passes.

title: Task 1.4: Set up Axios request utility
description: src/api/request.ts: Axios instance, JWT interceptor, response envelope unwrapping, 401 handling.

title: Task 1.5: Generate TypeScript types from OpenAPI
description: Run openapi-typescript-code-gen on openapi.yaml to generate src/types/api.ts. Fix any TypeScript errors.

title: Task 1.6: Set up Vue Router
description: src/router/index.ts: hash mode, all routes from design.md, lazy-loaded pages, auth navigation guard.

title: Task 1.7: Set up Pinia stores
description: src/stores/auth.ts (token/user/login/logout) + src/stores/app.ts (theme/sidebar/language). Persist to localStorage.

title: Task 1.8: Create layout components
description: AppLayout, Sidebar (collapsible menu), Header (language/theme/user), Footer. Ant Design layout.

title: Task 1.9: Set up i18n with 10 languages
description: src/i18n/: locale files for en-US + 9 others, vue-i18n config, persisted language preference.

title: Epic 4: Trading + Market Data
description: Quick trade execution, global market overview, watchlist, IBKR panel, MT5 panel.

title: Task 4.1: Quick Trade API + Page
description: src/api/quickTrade.ts + src/views/quick-trade/QuickTrade.vue: balance, order form, position display, order history.

title: Task 4.2: Global Market Page
description: src/views/market/GlobalMarket.vue: Fear & Greed, indices, forex, crypto, commodities panels.

title: Task 4.3: Watchlist
description: Market watchlist: add/remove symbols, price ticker with refresh, persistence.

title: Task 4.4: IBKR Trading Page
description: src/views/trading/IBKR.vue: connect/disconnect, account, positions, orders, place order, quote.

title: Task 4.5: MT5 Trading Page
description: src/views/trading/MT5.vue: same as IBKR for MetaTrader 5.

title: Task 4.6: Commit Phase 4 PR
description: Branch feat/trading-market-data. Open PR to main.

title: Epic 2: Auth + Dashboard + Portfolio
description: User registration, login, OAuth flows. Dashboard with summary/trades/orders. Portfolio positions, monitors, alerts. User profile.

title: Task 2.1: Dashboard API + Store + Page
description: src/api/dashboard.ts + src/stores/dashboard.ts + src/views/dashboard/Dashboard.vue: summary cards, recent trades table, pending orders.

title: Task 2.2: Portfolio API + Store
description: src/api/portfolio.ts + src/stores/portfolio.ts: positions CRUD, monitors, alerts, groups, summary endpoints.

title: Task 2.3: Portfolio Positions Page
description: src/views/portfolio/Portfolio.vue: positions table with add/edit/delete modals, P&L display.

title: Task 2.4: Portfolio Monitors and Alerts
description: Monitors list + alerts list with create/edit/delete forms. Position grouping.

title: Task 2.5: User Profile + Notification Settings
description: src/api/user.ts + src/views/user/Profile.vue: view/edit profile, notification settings.

title: Task 2.6: Commit Phase 2 PR
description: Branch feat/auth-dashboard-portfolio. Open PR to main.

title: Epic 8: Deployment
description: Production build, Docker image, staging deploy, production deploy, final smoke test.

title: Task 8.1: Production Build
description: npm run build in frontend_vue3/. Verify dist/ builds with zero errors.

title: Task 8.2: Docker Build
description: Dockerfile in frontend_vue3/: multi-stage Node->nginx build. Verify image builds and runs.

title: Task 8.3: Staging Deploy
description: Deploy to staging port (8889) or staging environment. Run smoke test.

title: Task 8.4: Production Deploy
description: Swap frontend/dist/ or cut over nginx config to new app. Zero downtime preferred.

title: Task 8.5: Final E2E Verification
description: Run full Playwright suite against production. All tests green. User sign-off.

title: Epic 5: AI Analysis + Indicators
description: AI multi-agent chat, fast analysis, indicator list/editor/backtest, backtest history and AI analysis.

title: Task 5.1: AI Chat API + Store
description: src/api/aiChat.ts + src/stores/aiChat.ts: chat/message, chat/history, chat/history/save endpoints.

title: Task 5.2: AI Analysis Page (Multi-agent)
description: src/views/ai-analysis/AIAnalysis.vue: multi-agent panel, chat input, streaming responses, message history.

title: Task 5.3: Fast Analysis Page
description: src/views/ai-analysis/FastAnalysis.vue: symbol input, analysis trigger, confidence/confirmation display.

title: Task 5.4: Indicator API + Page
description: src/api/indicator.ts + src/views/indicators/Indicators.vue: list, code editor, save/delete, AI generate.

title: Task 5.5: Backtest Page
description: src/views/backtest/Backtest.vue: run backtest form, history, precision info, AI analyze button.

title: Task 5.6: Commit Phase 5 PR
description: Branch feat/ai-analysis-indicators. Open PR to main.

title: Epic 7: Testing + Verification
description: TypeScript strict check, unit tests (Vitest), E2E smoke tests (Playwright), feature parity comparison, i18n completeness.

title: Task 7.1: TypeScript Strict Check
description: vue-tsc --noEmit. Fix all TypeScript errors across the entire frontend_vue3 project.

title: Task 7.2: Unit Tests (Vitest)
description: tests/unit/: auth store, format utilities, DataTable, StatusBadge, FormModal components.

title: Task 7.3: E2E Tests (Playwright)
description: tests/e2e/: auth flows, dashboard loads, strategy CRUD, portfolio view. Runs in CI.

title: Task 7.4: Feature Parity Checklist
description: Run existing + new app side-by-side. Check every item in the 80+ item checklist. Fix discrepancies.

title: Task 7.5: i18n Completeness Check
description: Verify all 10 languages have all keys. No MISSING_TRANSLATION warnings.

title: Task 7.6: Performance Audit
description: Lighthouse audit on dashboard, strategy list, portfolio. LCP < 2.5s, no major layout shifts.

title: Task 7.7: Commit Phase 7 PR
description: Branch feat/testing-verification. Open PR to main.

title: Epic 0: OpenAPI Spec
description: Add Swagger/OpenAPI support to Flask backend. Generate openapi.yaml covering all 80 endpoints.

title: Task 0.1: Add flasgger to requirements.txt
description: Add flasgger==0.9.7.1 to backend_api_python/requirements.txt

title: Task 0.2: Initialize Flasgger in Flask app
description: Import and register Flasgger in app/__init__.py. Register at /apidocs/ endpoint.

title: Task 0.3: Annotate auth routes
description: Add Flasgger docstrings to all 14 auth endpoints in auth.py

title: Task 0.4: Annotate dashboard + strategy routes
description: Add docstrings to all dashboard.py and strategy.py endpoints (~25 routes)

title: Task 0.5: Annotate portfolio + market + quick_trade routes
description: Add docstrings to portfolio.py, market.py, quick_trade.py endpoints (~30 routes)

title: Task 0.6: Annotate remaining routes
description: Annotate ai_chat, fast_analysis, indicator, backtest, global_market, settings, billing, community, user, credentials, polymarket, ibkr, mt5 (~40 routes)

title: Task 0.7: Export openapi.yaml
description: Export complete OpenAPI 3.0 spec as openapi.yaml from Flasgger

title: Task 0.8: Create PR for OpenAPI spec
description: Branch feat/openapi-spec, commit all swagger changes, push and create PR to main
